meaning: adj.<俚> 极小的,不足道的,整洁的
examples: I grew up in a dinky little town that didn't even have a movie theater.
The hotels are full, and the guests have had to go to this dinky little motel way out on Stewart Avenue.
Sure, the machines had dinky screens and janky keyboards.
Dinky is our family dog and he really belongs to my sister, Aria.
But they also suffer from cramped keyboards, dinky screens and relatively pokey processors.
